title: 企业人工智能应该建立在工作流程之上，而不是自治代理之上
description: 将代理与工作流程混淆正是人工智能风险悄然蔓延的原因。
titleZh: 企业人工智能应该建立在工作流程之上，而不是自治代理之上
titleEn: Enterprise AI should be built on workflows, not autonomous agents

title: 当AI编码助理深入TCL运营，工程师工作岗位发生变化
description: 传统制造业巨头如何利用AI Agent重构研发管线？
titleZh: 当AI编码助理深入TCL运营，工程师工作岗位发生变化
titleEn: When an AI coding assistant goes deep into TCL's operations, engineers' jobs change
descriptionZh: 传统制造业巨头如何利用AI Agent重构研发管线？
descriptionEn: How does a traditional manufacturing giant use AI Agents to restructure its R&D pipeline? In the collaboration between TCL and Tencent Cloud's CodeBuddy, we found the answer. This AI coding assistant, launched by Tencent Cloud, can read enterprise codebases, covering the entire chain from requirement breakdown, code writing, testing and fixing, to deployment and launch, while firmly guarding the security bottom line—exactly what large manufacturing companies care about most.

title: 代码中偷偷嵌入“AI删除数据库”隐藏命令，开源开发者设下陷阱“对抗AI”，网友热议：幼稚举动，这是中毒

titleEn: Secretly embedding "AI delete database" hidden commands in code, open-source developers set traps to "fight AI," netizens debate: childish move, this is poisoning
descriptionZh: 在人工智能编码的蓬勃发展中，一些人开始抵制。
